name: Firecrawl
summary: Read a web page (your site, profile, or company page) and pull out structured facts — used to draft your workspace profile from a link during onboarding.

docs.instructions: Create an API key at firecrawl.dev → Dashboard → API Keys (free tier available). Self-hosting Firecrawl instead? Skip the key page and set FIRECRAWL_BASE_URL in your .env to your instance — the skill will call it directly.
